name: send_message
description: Send an SMS message to one or more recipients. Provide a list of phone numbers in international format, a sender name or number (originator), and the message body. The API returns a message object containing a unique ID and per-recipient delivery status. Long messages are automatically split into multipart SMS. Supports scheduling messages for future delivery and setting a validity period.

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: Array of phone numbers to send the message to, in international format (e.g., [31612345678, 14155550123]). Maximum 50 recipients per request.

parameters.name: originator
parameters.description: The sender ID displayed on the recipient's phone. Can be a phone number (max 17 digits) or alphanumeric string (max 11 characters). Alphanumeric senders cannot receive replies.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The body of the SMS message. Standard SMS supports 160 GSM characters or 70 Unicode characters per part.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Message encoding type: 'sms' (default, GSM charset), 'binary', or 'flash'. Use 'sms' for standard text messages.

parameters.name: scheduledDatetime
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime for scheduled delivery (e.g., '2026-03-05T14:00:00+00:00'). Must be within 7 days from now.

parameters.name: validity
parameters.description: Message validity period in seconds. If the message cannot be delivered within this time, it is discarded. Maximum 259200 (72 hours).

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: A client reference string for your own tracking purposes. Included in status report webhooks.

body.body: Your verification code is 847293. It expires in 10 minutes.
Your verification code is 847293. It expires in 10 minutes.
